title: ctenopteris millefolia
intro: Ctenopteris millefolia, also known as the fern-leaf ctenopteris, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia, characterized by its distinctive fern-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris millefolia have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Ctenopteris millefolia is often prepared as a herbal infusion or tea, and can also be used in topical preparations such as creams and ointments.
